title: Stenorrhynchos aurantiacum
taxonomy: Stenorrhynchos aurantiacum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Stenorrhynchos, which is a small group of epiphytic orchids. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. Stenorrhynchos aurantiacum is native to tropical regions and is often found in humid, subtropical environments. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.

intro: Stenorrhynchos aurantiacum, also known as the Orange Beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Bioactive constituents of Stenorrhynchos aurantiacum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
